basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 28 years of age who have Intermediate or 12th pass in Science stream, Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline, Computer Diploma, and 02 years of experience as a Data Entry Operator in Health Research Projects are eligible to apply for these Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) vacancies. The online

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: Essential: Intermediate or 12th pass in science stream from a recognized board + Bachelor's degree in any discipline + any Computer Diploma + at least 02 years of experience as a Data Entry Operator in Health Research Projects. Desirable: Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and Data Management Software (Epicollect/REDCap).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) position is 12th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification is Intermediate or 12th pass in the science stream, a Bachelor's degree in any discipline, and any Computer Diploma. Additionally, at least two years of experience as a Data Entry Operator in Health Research Projects is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) post is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 29,200/- per month for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) post.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) position in this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to fill and submit the application form through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What are the desirable qualifications for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and experience with Data Management Software such as Epicollect or REDCap.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by a physical interview. Candidates are advised to prepare for both stages.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Delhi Data Entry Operator (Grade-B) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
